title: Nature's Basket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nature's Basket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
